coverage_note: The bundled HNF1A population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from HNF1A pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000135100: HNF1A coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: HNF1A findings should be read against pancreatic beta-cell transcription, hepatic gene regulation, MODY biology, glycemic control, and CRP/lipid trait associations; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

HNF1A MODY3 loss-of-function model is curated as a HNF1A marker for MODY3 review context, Beta-cell function and glycemic trait biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

rs1169288 (HNF1A I27L) is curated as a HNF1A marker for MODY3 review context, Beta-cell function and glycemic trait biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
